voices.name: Michael C. Vincent - Suspenseful Storyteller
voices.description: A cinematic voice built for suspense, horror, and mystery, theatrical in delivery and precise in emotion. Deep warmth and sharp clarity bring every dramatic story to life with gravitas and tension, perfect for film narration, audiobooks, and immersive storytelling.

voices.name: Jon - Natural Authority (Agent / Assistant)
voices.description: A calm, natural American voice built for AI agents, assistants, and enterprise systems. Confident, precise, and trusted in healthcare, legal, finance, and high-stakes support.

voices.name: Dexter - Dynamic, Bold and British
voices.description: Dexter - Dynamic British Presenter - Energetic, friendly British voice – perfect for explainers, ads, YouTube narration, corporate comms and product promos needing a confident and compelling sound. Trained by the UK's leading broadcaster, this voice is designed for clarity and impact.

voices.name: Charles - Expressive, Mature and Clear
voices.description: Charles - Mature Narrator - An expressive voice of a mature English gentleman, speaking with an old fashioned British RP accent. Ideal for narration and audiobooks.

voices.name: Hale - Expressive, Deep and Emotive
voices.description: Hale - Expressive & Emotive - A voice trained for more dynamic audio, with lots of expression, and trained with v3 in Mind!

voices.name: Asher James - Deep, Smooth and Romantic
voices.description: Asher James - Deep smooth hero for novels - Deep, smooth male voice. Great for the hero in an audiobook narration. Keywords: romance, thriller, mystery, authoritative, dark, alpha, fantasy, paranormal, romantasy, suspense, literary.

voices.name: James - Calm, Comforting and Gentle
voices.description: James - Calm & comforting male voice - A warm, grounded male voice with a calm, friendly presence. Delivered in clear, neutral English, this smooth and steady tone gently guides listeners into deep relaxation - ideal for meditation, mindfulness, and inner peace.

voices.name: Joe Inglewood - Magnetic and Captivating
voices.description: Joe Inglewood - A velvety smooth middle age American Voice which is conversational in style and warm in tone.  An excellent voice for audiobooks of all kinds along with E-Learning content.

voices.name: Harwood - Clear, Expressive, Engaging
voices.description: Seasoned English storyteller and narrator — engaging, dramatic, precise and crystal-clear. Perfect for fiction & non-fiction audiobooks, authoritative documentaries, immersive e-learning, persuasive marketing and commercials, natural VO and podcasts, and dependable IVR prompts.

voices.name: Thomas - Calm, Clear and Informative
voices.description: Thomas - Measured, Clear, Informative  - A clear projecting voice for News articles, Elearning and Non- Fiction Audiobooks.  An even and consistent tone at a medium pace suitable for all long form applications.

voices.name: Don - Social Media and Audiobook Voice
voices.description: Don - Social Media & Audiobook Voice - This is a young American male voice with a casual, approachable tone that feels natural and engaging. It’s light, clear, and expressive—perfect for conversations with listeners in a relaxed way. This style works especially well for social media content, storytelling, and audiobooks, where relatability and flow are key. The voice carries warmth and clarity, making it easy to listen to over long sessions, from narration, and conversation, to digital campaigns, podcasts, infomercials, and more!

voices.name: Jett - Gritty and Spunky Young Hero
voices.description: Jett - Gritty & Spunky Young Hero - A young hero with a bit of an edge to him. He could fight demons or host your podcast!

voices.name: Michael - Genuine and Approachable
voices.description: Michael - My voice is clear, confident, and versatile—perfect for narration, advertising, training, or storytelling. It carries warmth and authority, making complex ideas easy to understand while keeping listeners engaged.

voices.name: Ollie - Natural & Relaxed British Voice
voices.description: A clear, grounded voice that feels effortlessly real. Calm, conversational, and trustworthy – ideal for narrations, explainers, and AI dialogue where warmth and ease matter most.

voices.name: Gregory – Tech Reviewer Social Media
voices.description: A young and smooth sounding conversationalist that is perfect for any and all content creators, instructors, brand spokespersons, or podcast hosts. Overall, this voice is perfect for a more youthful experience anywhere clear communication and subtle charisma are needed.

voices.name: Sawyer - Calm, Measured and Serious
voices.description: Sawyer - Business Book Narrator - Upbeat, professional middle-aged male voice with a slight twinge of enthusiasm. Perfect for narrating business or motivational audiobooks.

voices.name: Adam - Articulate Engineering Professor
voices.description: Adam - Engineering Professor - Engineering professor with deliberate, slow, confident voice, Canadian/American accent, male early 40s, great for creating voiceover for e-learning, teaching, training, e-book, storytelling, and narration.

voices.name: Michael C. Vincent - Confident, Expressive
voices.description: Michael C. Vincent - A confident and expressive narrator across multiple genres. Warm bass tones and crisp high-end clarity deliver an articulate, intelligent voice suited for commercials, explainers, educational narrations and storytelling.

voices.name: Joe - Confident Idiot
voices.description: Uneducated, oblivious male. Endlessly opinionated. Great for blunt, rude, annoying and incorrect content. American male. A funny voice by Hey Its Brad.

voices.name: Ken Franson - Professional and Calm
voices.description: Ken Franson - Professional Narration - This voice is warm, clear, deep, and engaging, with a balanced tone that suits a variety of voiceover applications. It demonstrates confidence and control, making it ideal for audiobooks, professional narration, commercials, or animated roles. The delivery is steady, ensuring intelligibility and a polished sound for recording purposes.
